language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the application.

mode.title: LED mode
mode.description: Choose output mode and tune static color when needed.
mode.lockedReasonCalibration: Complete calibration before enabling LED mode.

startupTray.title: Startup & Tray
startupTray.launchAtLoginDescription: Start LumaSync automatically when you log in.
startupTray.trayInfo: The app runs in the system tray when closed.

aboutLogs.title: About & Logs
aboutLogs.logsDescription: Application logs are stored locally for debugging.

device.title: Device
device.description: Scan serial ports, choose one, and connect without restarting the app.

groups.supportedDescription: Detected USB adapters that match current allowlist.
groups.otherDescription: Manual fallback ports. You can still select and try Connect.
groups.empty: No ports in this group yet. Use Refresh to scan again.

selection.title: Manual selection
selection.description: Manual port selection stays available even when auto-detect misses.
selection.emptyHint: Choose a port to enable Connect.

status.idleBody: Select a port and use Connect when ready.
status.scanningBody: We keep your list visible while scan runs in the background.
status.reconnectingBody: Auto-recovery is running with short retries. You can switch to manual connect anytime.
status.connectedBody: Connected on {{port}}. You can keep using this port for the next start.
status.missingBody: Your previous selection is no longer available. Pick another port and retry.
status.errorBody: Connection was not completed. Refresh, pick another port, and try again.
status.nextSteps: Tip: if your remembered port appears again, it will be selected automatically.

healthCheck.inProgressBody: We are validating visibility, support, and connection status.
healthCheck.passBody: All setup checks passed for the selected port.
healthCheck.failBody: Review the failed step details, then refresh, choose another port, or retry.

section.title: Calibration
section.description: Reuse the same editor for first-time setup and advanced adjustments.
section.emptyState: No calibration saved yet. Open the editor to map your strip before enabling live mode.

overlay.title: Calibration Editor
overlay.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved calibration changes. Discard and close?

template.title: Pick a monitor template
template.description: Start with a template or skip to manual setup.

editor.title: LED map editor
editor.description: Adjust side counts, bottom missing LEDs, and traversal before saving.
